comment: 52yo postmenopausal woman, BMI 37 (class 2 obesity), no current cancer. Engine routes to PreventionPlan: standard = structured behavioral weight-loss + GLP-1 RA pharmacotherapy (semaglutide 2.4mg) + bariatric surgery referral discussion + BMI-elevated cancer screening (mammography, endometrial awareness); alternative = brief intervention + screening only.
